name: UserRating
description: This object describes the rating of a user based on their Telegram Star spendings.

fields.name: level
fields.description: Current level of the user, indicating their reliability when purchasing digital goods and services. A higher level suggests a more trustworthy customer; a negative level is likely reason for concern.

fields.name: rating
fields.description: Numerical value of the user's rating; the higher the rating, the better

fields.name: current_level_rating
fields.description: The rating value required to get the current level

fields.name: next_level_rating
fields.description: The rating value required to get to the next level; omitted if the maximum level was reached
